name: SCHUFA Holding AG
instructions: Germany's main credit bureau. Send a GDPR Art. 17 erasure request by email or post. Include full name, date of birth and address.

name: Creditreform Boniversum GmbH
instructions: Creditreform subsidiary holding consumer credit scores in Germany. Send GDPR erasure or objection by email with name, address and date of birth.

name: CRIF GmbH
instructions: CRIF (formerly CrifBurgel) is a major German credit and address data company. File a GDPR objection or erasure request via email including full name, DOB and address.

name: Regis24 GmbH
instructions: German credit and address data provider. Send a GDPR Art. 17 deletion or Art. 21 objection request by email with name, DOB and address.

name: infoscore Consumer Data GmbH
instructions: German credit/scoring company (now part of Riverty/Bertelsmann). Request data erasure via GDPR Art. 17 email including full name, DOB and current address.

name: DEMDA Deutsche Mieter Datenbank GmbH
instructions: German tenant/renter database used by landlords. Send GDPR erasure request with your full name, date of birth and former addresses.

name: AZ Direct GmbH
instructions: Bertelsmann-owned German address and direct-marketing broker. Use the online opt-out form at the opt-out URL, or send GDPR objection by email with full name and address.

name: Deutsche Post Direkt GmbH
instructions: Deutsche Post subsidiary providing address data for direct marketing. File a GDPR Art. 21 objection by email to opt out of advertising use of your address.

name: Schober Information Group Deutschland GmbH
instructions: German address and marketing data broker. Send GDPR erasure or objection by email with full name and address to be removed from their consumer database.

name: microm Micromarketing-Systeme u. Consult GmbH
instructions: German geo-marketing and household data company (part of Creditreform). Send GDPR Art. 21 objection or Art. 17 erasure request by email.

name: Uniserv GmbH
instructions: German data quality and address management company. They process address data for marketing clients. Send GDPR objection or erasure email.

name: ABIS GmbH
instructions: German address data company. Send GDPR Art. 17 erasure or Art. 21 objection request by email with your name and address.

name: eGENTIC GmbH
instructions: German lead-generation and address data broker. Send GDPR Art. 21 objection or Art. 17 deletion request by email.

name: E2Ma GmbH
instructions: German address and advertising data company. Submit a GDPR erasure or objection request by email.

name: dataXtrade GmbH
instructions: German online advertising and data trading company. Send GDPR objection or deletion request by email with your name.

name: Acxiom Deutschland GmbH
instructions: German subsidiary of Acxiom. Use the online opt-out form to suppress your data from their consumer database, or email the German DPO.

name: Das Telefonbuch (DTM Deutsche Tele Medien GmbH)
instructions: Germany's national telephone directory. Request removal via the Data Protection page. Requires identity verification.

name: Das Oertliche
instructions: German local phone directory. Visit the Datenschutz page to request removal of your personal listing.

name: Gelbe Seiten
instructions: Germany's leading business directory. Use the contact form or email to request removal of a personal or business listing.

name: 11880.com
instructions: German telephone search portal. Request personal data removal via the Datenschutz (privacy) page or email.

name: Bisnode Deutschland GmbH
instructions: Dun & Bradstreet Germany (trading as Bisnode). They hold business and consumer credit data. Send GDPR Art. 21 objection or Art. 17 erasure request by email with full name, DOB and address.

name: Dun & Bradstreet Deutschland GmbH
instructions: D&B Germany holds commercial credit and address data on individuals and businesses. File GDPR erasure or objection request by email.

name: Datarade GmbH
instructions: Berlin-based global data marketplace. Send GDPR Art. 17 erasure request via email.

name: GfK SE
instructions: Global market research company headquartered in Germany. They hold consumer panel data. Send GDPR Art. 21 objection or Art. 17 erasure request by email.

name: HEROLD Business Data GmbH
instructions: Austria's main business/phone directory and address data provider. Use the online deletion form or email the GDPR contact.

name: AZ Direct Oesterreich GmbH
instructions: Austrian address and direct-marketing data broker (Bertelsmann). Send GDPR objection or erasure email with your name and Austrian address.

name: Equifax Ltd. (UK)
instructions: UK credit reference agency. Submit a subject access request or erasure request via the Privacy Hub online form or by post. You'll need to verify your identity.

name: TransUnion UK (Callcredit)
instructions: UK credit reference agency (formerly Callcredit). Use the Privacy Centre to request access to or erasure of your data. Identity verification required.

name: GB Group Plc (GBG)
instructions: UK identity verification and address data company. Send a GDPR/UK GDPR Subject Access or erasure request to the DPO email.

name: Databroker Ltd.
instructions: UK consumer and business data broker. Send a UK GDPR erasure or objection request by email with your full name and address.

name: 192.com People Search (UK)
instructions: UK people-search site. Visit the Privacy page to request suppression of your personal listing. Usually requires proof of identity.

name: Bisnode AB (Nordic/Pan-EU)
instructions: Bisnode (Dun & Bradstreet's Nordic/EU brand) holds business and consumer data across Europe. Submit a GDPR erasure or objection request via email.

name: Experian GmbH (Germany)
instructions: Experian Germany - holds credit and address data. Send GDPR erasure or subject access request by email.

name: Experian Austria GmbH
instructions: Experian Austria - credit and address data. Send GDPR erasure request by email.

name: Dun & Bradstreet Austria GmbH
instructions: D&B Austria - commercial credit and contact data. Send GDPR erasure or objection by email.

name: Sales.Rocks BV
instructions: European B2B sales intelligence platform. Submit GDPR Art. 17 erasure or Art. 21 objection request by email.

name: DPIT GmbH (ProfileAddress)
instructions: German address enrichment company. Send GDPR objection or erasure request by email with your name and address.

name: zeotap GmbH
instructions: Berlin-based identity data platform. Use the individual rights form or email to submit a GDPR erasure request.

name: nugg.ad GmbH
instructions: German digital audience profiling platform. Opt out via the privacy page or submit a GDPR erasure by email.

name: emetriq GmbH
instructions: Hamburg-based audience data company (Deutsche Telekom subsidiary). Use opt-out form or email to submit GDPR objection.

name: RB Information Services (UK)
instructions: UK address intelligence data broker. Send a UK GDPR Art. 17 erasure or Art. 21 objection request by email.
